creator: kenji.rikitake@acm.org
text:
when compiling the package ja-ptex-common-2.1.8 from the
	3.3-RELEASE ports collection at japanese/ptex-common,
	the compiled executable does not run with the error message from
	/usr/libexec/ld-so.elf of 'libkpathsea.so.* not found'.

Fix: Disabling using shared library solves this issue,
	by removing the --enable-shared option on DO_CONFIGURE
	in the Makefile.
How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/ports/japanese/ptex-common
	make
	make install
	rehash
	ptex
